franky  1.1.4
A High-Level Motion API for Franka
Namespace List
Here is a list of all namespaces with brief descriptions:
[detail level 123]
 ▼Nfranky
 CCartesianState
 CDynamicsLimitA template class representing a dynamics limit with a maximum value
 CElbowStateElbow state of the robot
 CGripperExceptionException thrown by the gripper class
 CGripperA wrapper around the franka::Gripper class that adds asynchronous functionality
 CJointStateJoint state of a robot
 CModelA wrapper around franka::Model that uses Eigen types
 CCartesianReferenceCartesian impedance reference expressed in the base frame
 CCartesianImpedanceGains
 CPostureTaskJoint-posture objective projected into the Cartesian nullspace
 CManipulabilityTaskManipulability maximization objective projected into the Cartesian nullspace
 CNullspaceGainsRuntime-adjustable gains for a nullspace task
 ▼CCartesianImpedanceBaseBase class for client-side cartesian impedance motions
 CParamsParameters for the impedance motion
 ▼CCartesianImpedanceMotionCartesian impedance motion
 CParamsParameters for the Cartesian impedance motion
 CCartesianImpedanceTrackingMotionCartesian impedance tracking motion
 CCartesianMotionCartesian motion with a single target
 CCartesianVelocityMotionCartesian velocity motion with a single target velocity
 CCartesianVelocityWaypointMotionCartesian velocity waypoint motion
 CCartesianWaypointMotionCartesian waypoint motion
 CConditionA condition on the robot state
 CJointReferenceJoint-space reference for joint impedance motions
 CJointImpedanceGains
 CJointImpedanceParamsParameters for joint impedance motions
 CJointImpedanceBaseBase class for client-side joint impedance motions
 CJointImpedanceMotionClient-side joint impedance controller
 CJointImpedanceTrackingMotionClient-side joint impedance controller with a dynamic online reference
 CJointMotionJoint motion with a single target
 CJointVelocityMotionJoint velocity motion with a single target
 CJointVelocityWaypointMotionJoint velocity waypoint motion
 CJointWaypointMotionJoint waypoint motion
 CMeasureA measure on the robot state
 CReactionA reaction that can be attached to a motion
 CMotionBase class for motions
 CReactionRecursionExceptionException thrown when the reaction recursion limit (8) is reached
 CMotionGeneratorHelper class for handling motions and reactions
 CPositionWaypointA position waypoint with a target and optional parameters
 CPositionWaypointMotionA motion following multiple positional waypoints in a time-optimal way. Works with arbitrary initial conditions
 CStopMotion
 CStopMotion< franka::JointPositions >Stop motion for joint position control mode
 CStopMotion< franka::JointVelocities >Stop motion for joint velocity position control mode
 CStopMotion< franka::CartesianPose >Stop motion for cartesian pose control mode
 CStopMotion< franka::CartesianVelocities >Stop motion for cartesian velocity control mode
 CTorqueStopParamsParameters for the torque-control stop motion (StopMotion<franka::Torques>)
 CStopMotion< franka::Torques >Graceful stop for torque-control (impedance) motions
 CTorqueSafetyParams
 CFrictionCompensationParams
 CVelocityWaypointMotionA motion following multiple positional waypoints in a time-optimal way. Works with arbitrary initial conditions
 CMotionPlannerExceptionException thrown if the motion planner fails
 CWaypointA waypoint with a target and optional parameters
 CWaypointMotionA motion following multiple waypoints in a time-optimal way. Works with arbitrary initial conditions
 CRelativeDynamicsFactorRelative dynamics factors
 CInvalidMotionTypeExceptionException thrown when an invalid motion type is used
 CMotionReuseExceptionException thrown when a motion is started more than once

 CParamsGlobal parameters for the robot
 CRobotPoseCartesian pose of a robot

 CRobotStateEstimator
 CRobotVelocityCartesian velocity of a robot
